name: Build Notebooks to HTML

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
    paths:
      - '**.ipynb'
      - '.github/workflows/build-notebooks.yml'
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: "pages"
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install jupyter nbconvert

      - name: Convert notebooks to HTML
        run: |
          # Create output directory
          mkdir -p docs
          
          # Find all notebooks and convert them
          find . -name "*.ipynb" -not -path "./.git/*" | while read notebook; do
            echo "Converting $notebook..."
            jupyter nbconvert --to html "$notebook" --output-dir docs --output "$(basename "$notebook" .ipynb).html"
          done

      - name: Create index page
        run: |
          cat > docs/index.html << 'EOF'
          <!DOCTYPE html>
          <html>
          <head>
              <title>Notebooks</title>
              <style>
                  body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; margin: 40px; }
                  h1 { color: #333; }
                  ul { list-style-type: none; padding: 0; }
                  li { margin: 10px 0; }
                  a { color: #0066cc; text-decoration: none; }
                  a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
              </style>
          </head>
          <body>
              <h1>Notebook Documentation</h1>
              <ul>
          EOF
          
          # Generate links to all converted notebooks
          find docs -name "*.html" -not -name "index.html" | sort | while read html; do
            name=$(basename "$html" .html)
            echo "                <li><a href=\"$(basename "$html")\">$name</a></li>" >> docs/index.html
          done
          
          cat >> docs/index.html << 'EOF'
              </ul>
          </body>
          </html>
          EOF

      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v2
        with:
          path: 'docs'

  deploy:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v2
